chunks.memory_unit_text: In the mochajs/mocha release v11.7.2, fixes were made to fail with an informative error message on a file with a broken default import and to load mjs files correctly. Documentation was extensively updated, including adding a banner from the old site to the new site, linking from new to old, adding info on spies to legacy docs, explaining node import swallowing error, fixing links in the new site, migrating assertion libraries wiki link, count assertions wiki page, shared behaviours, Spies wiki page, tagging wiki page, third party reporters wiki page, and global leak wiki page to docs, and updating the /next bug report link. Chores included adding an issue form for Performance, adding a test for -R import-only-loader, testing Node.js 24 in CI, bumping CI to use 20.19.4, 22.18.0, 24.6.0, bumping Knip to 5.61.2, and cleaning up references of --opts.

## [12.0.0-beta-1](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/compare/v11.7.4...v12.0.0-beta-1) (2025-11-25)
Maintainer notes: This is a beta release. It will be followed by 0 or more betas adding features and bugfixes, then 0 or more release candidates once we finish the v12 feature set, then a full release. For details, see #5551. Thanks for using Mocha, and happy testing!

### 🩹 Fixes
* correct assertion import syntax in getting-started guide ([#5526](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/issues/5526)) ([fb0215b](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/fb0215bd4fba44fde0cc7b8f9b91a4f07020a13b))
